# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource [ExposeProperties]

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Redis/addAzureManagedRedis(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource
Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Redis/runAsContainer(configureContainer?: callback) -> Aspire.Hosting.Azure.Redis/Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource
